experience.title: Project Coordinator
responsibilities: Managed landscape design projects from concept to completion, ensuring client satisfaction.
Coordinated with clients and vendors to schedule project timelines and deliveries.
Oversaw budget management and resource allocation for multiple landscaping projects.
Conducted site assessments to determine project feasibility and design requirements.

experience.title: Event Planner
responsibilities: Developed and executed event plans for corporate and private catering events.
Collaborated with clients to choose menu options and design themes.
Managed on-site logistics and staff coordination during events.
Handled customer feedback to improve service delivery and event execution.

response.summary: Detail-oriented project coordinator with a creative approach to problem-solving, skilled in managing client relationships and executing successful projects in landscaping and catering. Seeking to leverage strong organizational and communication skills in a new role.
